title: psittacanthus antioquiensis
intro: Psittacanthus antioquiensis, also known as the "Santa Fe" or "Golden Trumpet", is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Psittacanthus antioquiensis include tea infusions and tinctures, which are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
